item.title: Vector Search with Lucene
item.description: What is vector search The traditional lexical search works very well with structured data but what happens when we are dealing with unstructured data like images, video, raw text, etc?

item.title: Per Replica States: Improving SolrCloud stability & reliability
item.description: Solr nodes should be like cattle, not pets! Every week, somewhere in the world, at least one DevOps engineer responsible for a non-trivially sized Solr cluster thinks like this when they deal with SolrCloud operations such as cluster restarts.

item.title: Solr Bench: Performance Benchmarking Suite
item.description: What is Solr Bench? Solr Bench is a flexible, configurable benchmarking suite for Solr.

item.title: Getting Started with Apache Solr
item.description: What is Solr? In simple words, it is a search engine.

item.title: Payloads: Boost Popular Products for Queries
item.description: New Support for Payloads in Solr Support for payloads existed in Lucene since long, but good out of the box support for payloads in Solr has finally been introduced in version 6.
